sources.name: Frey & Osborne Automation Scores
sources.description: Automation probability scores for 702 US occupations. Adapted to ISCO-08 major groups with LMIC calibration.

sources.name: ILO ILOSTAT
sources.description: Wage, employment, and labor force participation data by country and sector.

sources.name: ILO Future of Work Task Indices
sources.description: Task-content indices (routine vs. non-routine, cognitive vs. manual) by occupation for 40+ countries.

sources.name: World Bank World Development Indicators
sources.description: Education, employment, and poverty indicators across LMICs.

sources.name: World Bank Human Capital Index
sources.description: Learning-adjusted years of schooling — accounts for quality, not just quantity of education.

sources.name: Wittgenstein Centre Education Projections
sources.description: Education level projections by country, age, and sex to 2100. Uses SSP2 scenario.

sources.name: ESCO Skills Taxonomy (EU)
sources.description: Multilingual skills and occupation taxonomy for portable, cross-border skills profiles.

sources.name: ILO ISCO-08
sources.description: International Standard Classification of Occupations — backbone for skills taxonomy.

sources.name: ITU Digital Development
sources.description: Mobile broadband and internet penetration — essential for calibrating digital readiness.

sources.name: World Bank Enterprise Surveys
sources.description: Firm-level data on employment, labor practices, skills constraints, and perceptions.
